description:
How, exactly, does Lila Moss spend a day in Paris? Vogue shadowed the face of YSL Beauty in the run up to Saint Laurent’s autumn/winter 2024 show during Paris Fashion Week. Her first stop: Orf Bookshop in the Marais, before getting her caffeine fix at Umami Matcha Café and heading on to Pharmacie des Capucines. “I’ve been coming here every time I go to Paris for many years,” she tells Vogue (Kate Moss, it turns out, is also a fan of just about any French pharmacy).

#LilaMoss #KateMoss #Vogue

Watch more form British Vogue:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZA_ZaXeFPYE
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a9cmdmIN0dY
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_BngLlodIuw
